title: Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Clone Wars}}
[[File:Defenseofkamino.jpg|thumb|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1'']]
The '''''Star Wars: Clone Wars''''' [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperback]] series from [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] collects [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] comic issues that focus on the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], primarily from the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series. Part of the [[Clone Wars multimedia project]], the series comprises nine volumes, published from [[July]] [[2003]] to July [[2006]].

==Media==
===Installments===

**[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]]
**[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]]
**''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]''
